CCashShop::OnEnableEquipSlotExt.notes: v61 EnableEquipSlot: IDB-mislabeled OnIncCharacterSlotCount @0x459928, send @0x459bb2: COutPacket(196) Encode1((v/1000==9110)+6=mode 6|7) Encode1(pointType) Encode4(currency) Encode1(flag=1) Encode4(serial). Body after mode = v72.

CCashShop::SendGiftsPacket.notes: v61 SendGiftsPacket sub_45C607 @0x45c607, send @0x45c981: COutPacket(196) Encode1(mode 4 regular gift) Encode4(birthday) Encode4(serial) EncodeStr(name) EncodeStr(message). = v72 (couple/friendship arms use other modes+option).

CCashShop::TrySendQueryCashRequest.notes: v61 CheckWallet: sub_45C33E COutPacket(195) @0x45c362, SendPacket with zero Encode* (empty query).

CLogin::ChangeStepImmediate.notes: v61 SERVERLIST_REQUEST/step-change send sub_56261B @0x56261b builds COutPacket(4)@0x562cbd + SendPacket@0x562cd0 with no Encode -> empty body. Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_56261B).

CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult#AuthLoginF.notes: v61 LOGIN_STATUS head. Surgically spliced (live v61 IDB has no demangled #AuthLoginFailed symbol; body at CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult @0x5657ce).

CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult#AuthPerman.notes: v61 LOGIN_STATUS perm-ban arm (resultCode v4==27) of CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult @0x5657ce: reads only the shared head (result+byte+int) then routes to a dialog (CUtilDlg::YesNo @0x565c5a); no trailing reason/timestamp is decoded. Matches atlas AuthPermanentBan GMS path (byte+byte+GMSint, no trailing bytes). Surgically spliced.

CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult#AuthTempor.notes: v61 LOGIN_STATUS temp-ban arm (resultCode v4==2) of CLogin::OnCheckPasswordResult @0x5657ce: after the shared head (result+byte+int) reads Value=Decode1(reason)@0x56583f + DecodeBuffer(8)@0x565848 (chatUnblockDate FILETIME). Matches atlas AuthTemporaryBan (byte+byte+GMSint+reason byte+long8). Surgically spliced.

CLogin::OnCheckPinCodeResult#RegisterPin.notes: v61 REGISTER_PIN send built in CLogin::OnCheckPinCodeResult @0x5688ce (v3==1 register arm @0x568b31): COutPacket(10) + Encode1(pinInput flag) then, when the flag is set, EncodeStr(pin). Matches atlas RegisterPin.Encode (WriteBool + conditional WriteAsciiString). Surgically spliced (IDB has no demangled #RegisterPin symbol).

CLogin::OnCheckUserLimitResult.notes: v61 SERVERSTATUS handler sub_56660E @0x56660e reads the 2-byte status word as 2 x Decode1 (@0x566623 status enum, @0x566626 flag), both -> sub_58FF89(status,flag); atlas writes WriteShort(status<256) = [status,0] so flag=0 -- wire-equivalent to the short. Recorded as one Decode2 (same convention as the verified v79 cell). Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_56660E).

calls.comment: world status (2 bytes; v61 sub_56660E@0x56660e reads as 2 x Decode1 @0x566623/@0x566626, atlas writes WriteShort -- wire-equivalent)

CLogin::OnSetAccountResult#AfterLogin.notes: v61 AFTER_LOGIN (COutPacket op 9) built by CLogin::OnSetAccountResult @0x56874d and CLogin::OnCheckPinCodeResult @0x568a5c/@0x56896c. Legacy wire carries Encode4(accountId @g_pWvsContext+8232) between opt2 and the pin string; v83 @0x5fc731 omits it. Atlas gates the int to GMS<83. Surgically spliced (live v61 IDB has no demangled #AfterLogin symbol).

calls.comment: accountId @0x5687d8 (*(g_pWvsContext+8232); OnCheckPinCodeResult @0x568a98/@0x5689a8) - LEGACY-ONLY int, absent in v83+

CLogin::OnWorldInformation.notes: v61 WORLD_INFORMATION world-record decoder sub_56663F @0x56663f (present-world branch, worldId >= 0). Structure identical to the verified v79 cell. Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_56663F).

CLogin::OnWorldInformation#ServerListEnd.notes: v61 WORLD_INFORMATION handler sub_56663F @0x56663f reads (char)Decode1(worldId)@0x566660; 0xFF (-1) < 0 takes the end-of-list else branch. atlas ServerListEnd writes the single 0xFF terminator. Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_56663F).

CLogin::SendCheckUserLimitPacket.notes: v61 SERVERSTATUS_REQUEST send = sub_5655DF @0x5655df: COutPacket(6)@0x565612 + Encode2(worldId)@0x56562e short. Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_5655DF).

CLogin::SendLoginPacket.notes: v61 CHARLIST_REQUEST send = sub_564DC9 @0x564dc9: COutPacket(5)@0x564eeb + Encode1(worldId)+Encode1(channelId) then SendPacket. NO getsockname/Encode4(socketAddr) — that is a v72+ addition (v72 twin sub_5B1B25 adds it @0x5b1c92). Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_564DC9).

CLogin::SendSelectCharPacket.notes: v61 CHAR_SELECT send = sub_564F79 @0x564f79: COutPacket(19)@0x564fe3 + Encode4(charId)+EncodeStr(mac)+EncodeStr(hwid). Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_564F79).

CLogin::SendSelectCharPacketByVAC#AllCha.notes: v61 PICK_ALL_CHAR send = sub_5650B6 @0x5650b6: COutPacket(14)@0x5651e0 + Encode4(charId)+Encode4(worldId)+EncodeStr(mac)+EncodeStr(hwid). Surgically spliced (IDB unnamed sub_5650B6).

CLogin::SendViewAllCharPacket.notes: v61 VIEW_ALL_CHAR (COutPacket op 13) send sub_567117 @0x567117: COutPacket(13)@0x567165 + SendPacket@0x567177 with no Encode -> empty body (first sends op 12 when this[79]!=1). Surgically spliced (live v61 IDB names it sub_567117); mirrors the v79 empty-body entry.
